description: Shot template catalog for reusable ride-story episode building.

templates.label: Park Intro
templates.purpose: Opening hook with title card, park/landmark, and guest energy.

templates.label: Land Arrival
templates.purpose: Establish the land/area before the attraction.

templates.label: Queue
templates.purpose: Queue approach, signage, barriers, and anticipation.

templates.label: Pre Show
templates.purpose: Briefing, warning, or setup scene before boarding.

templates.label: Launch
templates.purpose: Launch moment with speed lines and vehicle motion.

templates.label: First Reveal
templates.purpose: First large visual reveal of the ride world.

templates.label: Show Scene
templates.purpose: Character, prop, effect, and scenic storytelling beat.

templates.label: Creature Encounter
templates.purpose: Creature enters, reacts, scares or surprises the characters.

templates.label: Action Sequence
templates.purpose: Fast movement/action beat with multiple actors and effects.

templates.label: Best Moment
templates.purpose: Hero shot for the best/most memorable ride moment.

templates.label: Escape Sequence
templates.purpose: Urgent escape, chase, collapse, or danger beat.

templates.label: Finale
templates.purpose: Final show scene or emotional payoff.
